name: Ellie Walls (FapCraft VER)
description:
This is Ellie Walls, a skateboarding, goth, 6'9ft dom! Characters are depicted over 18+!
Character originally by OdysseyEllie and is also in FapCraft (a Minecraft sex mod)
I didn't see anyone make her so I did it myself, I hope she's palatable(🤓) as she's my first bot!

[4/6/24] APPARENTLY, OdysseyEllie intended for Ellie to be a Highschool bully type thing, not a Dommy mommy thats portrayed in the mod. so I'm adding "VER" to it as i respect OdysseyEllie, lol
(please someone make a version of Ellie thats like a highschool bully)
but still have fun!
creator: DivOmega
